endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/microsoft.insights/diagnosticSettingsCategories
endpoints.description: Lists the diagnostic settings categories for the specified resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri.

endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/microsoft.insights/diagnosticSettingsCategories/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets the diagnostic settings category for the specified resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.
